title: Build a CLI Chatbot Agent
titleZh: 构建一个命令行聊天机器人Agent
description: Build a Python CLI tool that chats with Claude, uses tools to search the web, and remembers your conversation. This is your first AI agent — it perceives (reads your input), reasons (calls Claude), and acts (executes tools).
descriptionZh: 构建一个Python命令行工具，可以与Claude对话、使用工具搜索网页，并记住你的对话。这是你的第一个AI Agent——它感知（读取你的输入）、推理（调用Claude）、行动（执行工具）。

milestones.label: Set up Python virtual environment and install anthropic SDK
milestones.labelZh: 搭建Python虚拟环境并安装anthropic SDK

milestones.label: Basic chat loop: user types, Claude responds, loop continues
milestones.labelZh: 基础聊天循环：用户输入，Claude回复，循环继续

milestones.label: Add a web search tool using function calling
milestones.labelZh: 通过函数调用添加网页搜索工具

milestones.label: Add conversation memory (store messages in a list)
milestones.labelZh: 添加对话记忆（将消息存储在列表中）

milestones.label: Handle errors gracefully (API failures, invalid input)
milestones.labelZh: 优雅地处理错误（API失败、无效输入）

m1: Set your API key: export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-...
m2: Use a while True loop with input() to read user messages
Call client.messages.create() with the user message
m3: Define a tool schema with name, description, and input_schema (JSON Schema)
Check if response.stop_reason == 'tool_use', then execute the tool and send back the result
m4: Append each user message and assistant response to the list
Pass the full list to messages.create() each time
m5: Wrap API calls in try/except anthropic.APIError
Add a 'quit' or 'exit' command to break the loop

stretch: Add streaming responses (print tokens as they arrive)
Add multiple tools (calculator, file reader, weather)
Add a system prompt that gives the agent a personality
Save conversation history to a JSON file
stretchZh: 添加流式响应（逐个打印token）
添加多个工具（计算器、文件读取、天气）
添加系统提示，赋予Agent个性
将对话历史保存到JSON文件
